title: Green Apples
description: Turns those mid red apples into the superior green ones. Granny Smith supremacy!
body:
Everyone knows granny smith apples are the best ones.

Built in compatibility for [Eating Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) mod.

![Yum!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bdcc0d9a4db656f64cbecea42a9b5d66429eb26.gif)
